result.nextStep: Continue SplitScreen cleanup - the destroyContainerRoots() still unmounts all roots after layout.destroy() may have already triggered close events. Consider reordering cleanup or making it more selective.
result.step: Extracted handleTabClose from inside useEffect callback to a factory function createHandleTabClose outside the component. This prevents stale closure issues and makes the function dependency on sshDisconnect explicit in the effect's dependency array.
